commands.summary: Backend build passed with agentRequestStatus and the MCP-safe agent status poll.
Tests cover the redacted agent status view (decided/decision/authority_granted/outcome/final_state, no operator identity) and MCP-token reachability.
Local audit passed after AGH-026 implementation and the agent governance contract doc.

environment.process_note: AGH-026: documented agent-governance-v1 contract (submit -> await -> outcome) mapped onto MCP bridge and Fabric dispatch/await_result, with a redacted agent status poll.
